heading: Appointment of members of Border Health Commission
label: 290n Appointment of members of Border Health Commission
text: Not later than 30 days after , the President shall appoint the United States members of the United States-Mexico Border Health Commission, and shall attempt to conclude an agreement with Mexico providing for the establishment of such Commission.November 29, 1999
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 290n, , , , related to the establishment of the Border Health Commission, prior to repeal by , , , 1501A–276.Pub. L. 103–400, § 2108 Stat. 4169Pub. L. 106–113, div. B, § 1000(a)(4) [title V, § 516(1)]113 Stat. 1535Oct. 22, 1994Nov. 29, 1999
Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 103–400, § 1108 Stat. 4169Oct. 22, 1994“This Act [enacting this subchapter] may be cited as the ‘United States-Mexico Border Health Commission Act’.”
